name: Shaeel Afsar
title: Lead Software Engineer
summary: Customer-focused technology leader with 10 years of combined experience in software engineering and sales within Fortune 500 companies. Skilled at bridging technical and business priorities, leading discovery sessions, and delivering scalable cloud solutions that drive measurable outcomes.

experience.summary: Defining requirements and proposing architectures that align enterprise systems with business objectives and customer workflows.
highlights: Defined requirements and proposed architectures aligning enterprise systems with business objectives and customer workflows.
Led discovery workshops, solution demos, and proof-of-concepts leveraging various technologies.
Designed scalable backend services using Java Spring Boot, improving system reliability and extensibility.
Presented architecture recommendations to leadership, clarifying complex designs for cross-functional stakeholders.
Mentored engineers on technical storytelling and stakeholder presentation skills.

experience.summary: Designed and delivered secure, scalable services using AWS and Java Spring Boot, improving compliance visibility across enterprise accounts.
highlights: Designed and delivered secure, scalable services using AWS and Java Spring Boot, improving compliance visibility across enterprise accounts.
Partnered with business teams to define RESTful API integrations, ensuring seamless automation between internal platforms.
Presented risk mitigation and architecture improvement strategies to leadership and partner teams.
Supported proofs-of-concept demonstrating AWS Cloud automation and system hardening, driving adoption across business units.

experience.summary: Engineered enterprise software solutions leveraging Java, REST APIs, and microservices to improve data accuracy and operational efficiency.
highlights: Engineered enterprise software solutions leveraging Java, REST APIs, and microservices to improve data accuracy and operational efficiency.
Collaborated with product managers to design integration flows across cloud systems and API endpoints.

experience.summary: Built a foundation in consultative selling, client engagement, and clear communication that carries into technical leadership today.
highlights: Consistently exceeded quotas, ranking in the top 5% regionally and earning multiple performance awards.
Built trust with customers through consultative selling, needs assessment, and clear product education.

education.summary: Coursework in software engineering, data structures, algorithms, and web application development.
